title: Overnight Ferry Charging: Water-Filling Under Session Fees
strategies: flat baseline: one constant rate for the whole overnight window (single session, no price awareness)
price-sorted greedy bin-fill: blast the rate cap into the cheapest steps until the energy target is met, ignoring quadratic loss equalization and session structure

threshold-swept water-filling: for each rank-k cheapest support set, bisect the water level that equalizes price plus marginal quadratic loss and meets the energy target exactly, price the realized session/demand-charge cost from the resulting positive-rate pattern, and keep the cheapest k
invalid: non-finite output, must be rejected
